message:
fix(database/postgres): remove redundant percent-decode on user/password fields from URL parser

The user and password fields extracted from the connection URL were being
passed through percent_decode a second time after the URL parser had
already decoded them, potentially mangling credentials that contain
percent-literal sequences (e.g. a password containing '%25' would
incorrectly become '%'). Now the raw decoded values from the URL are
stored as-is.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
